# SolidInvoice Documentation

> SolidInvoice is open-source invoicing software for freelancers and small businesses. Built on Symfony 7 and PHP 8.4. Self-hostable with full data ownership, or available as a hosted SaaS at $8/month flat — no per-client limits. Features include quotes, invoices (recurring and one-off), client management, payments via Payum (Stripe, PayPal), multi-currency, tax/discount handling, and a REST API.

## Getting Started

- [SolidInvoice Documentation](https://solidinvoice.co/docs/intro): Overview of SolidInvoice, key features, and entry points to the rest of the docs.

## Installation

- [Installation Guide](https://solidinvoice.co/docs/installation-guide): Overview of all installation methods with a decision matrix to pick the right one.
- [Quick install](https://solidinvoice.co/docs/installation-guide/quick-install): Recommended install — self-contained executable that bundles PHP, the webserver, and the messenger consumer. SSL via Let's Encrypt or custom certs.
- [Homebrew](https://solidinvoice.co/docs/installation-guide/homebrew): Install via the SolidWorx Homebrew tap on macOS or Linux.
- [Docker](https://solidinvoice.co/docs/installation-guide/docker): Run as a container, with a Docker Compose example covering app + MySQL.
- [Distribution package](https://solidinvoice.co/docs/installation-guide/distribution-package): Install on an existing PHP webserver (Nginx/Apache) — covers webserver config, cron, and the messenger consumer.
- [Cron job setup](https://solidinvoice.co/docs/installation-guide/distribution-package/cron-job-setup): Recurring task cron on Linux, Windows, cPanel, or Plesk. Only needed for distribution-package and Git installs.
- [Git (advanced)](https://solidinvoice.co/docs/installation-guide/git): Clone the source for contributors or developers — not for production use.
- [System Installation](https://solidinvoice.co/docs/installation-guide/system-installation): Running the web-based installation wizard to configure database, admin user, locale, and currency.

## Companies

- [Overview](https://solidinvoice.co/docs/companies/overview): SolidInvoice supports multiple companies per user; each company has isolated clients, invoices, and settings.
- [Creating a company](https://solidinvoice.co/docs/companies/creating-a-company): Step-by-step guide to creating a new company entity from the company dropdown.
- [Switching between companies](https://solidinvoice.co/docs/companies/switching-between-companies): How to switch the active company context.

## Managing Clients

- [Create new Client](https://solidinvoice.co/docs/managing-clients/create-new-client): Adding a new client to your company.

## Integrations

- [Sentry](https://solidinvoice.co/docs/integrations/sentry): Configuring Sentry error tracking via the `SENTRY_DSN` environment variable, for both Docker and distribution-package deployments.

## External Resources

- [REST API Documentation](https://solidinvoice.app/api/docs): Auto-generated OpenAPI/Swagger reference for the SolidInvoice REST API. Authentication via `X-API-TOKEN` header.
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/SolidInvoice/SolidInvoice): Source code, issues, contributions, releases.
- [Contribution Guide](https://github.com/SolidInvoice/SolidInvoice/blob/3.0.x/CONTRIBUTING.md): How to contribute to SolidInvoice.
